task.title: Creating a sequential or partitioned data set in an MVS subproject

titlealts.searchtitle: Creating a sequential or partitioned data set (PDS) in an MVS subproject

task.shortdesc: Follow these steps to create a new sequential or partitioned data set in an MVS subproject.

taskbody.prereq: You must be connected to a remote system.

step.cmd: In the view, navigate to the MVS subproject in which you want to create the new data set.
Select NewAllocate Sequential Data Set or NewAllocate Partitioned Data Set
step.stepresult: The New Data Set window opens, prompting you for the data set name and characteristics.

step.cmd: To allocate the data set with default characteristics:

substep.cmd: Type the new data set name.

substep.info: When you allocate data sets or create partitioned data set members from within an MVS subproject, the names are validated against z/OS naming rules to avoid spending the time that would be necessary to process allocation errors on z/OS. (The same type of validation is done for actions you perform in the Remote Systems view.)
substep.stepresult: The new member name is displayed in the window.

step.cmd: To set specific data set characteristics:

substep.cmd: Click Next to advance to the next wizard page.
substep.info: For help completing the fields in the New Data Set wizard, click the help icon.
